seoTitle: Tewinga vs Thalgarrah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tewinga and Thalgarrah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tewinga and Thalgarrah.
heading: Tewinga vs Thalgarrah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tewinga, New South Wales and Thalgarrah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tewinga has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Thalgarrah (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tewinga or Thalgarrah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tewinga has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Thalgarrah scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tewinga scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Thalgarrah scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tewinga or Thalgarrah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tewinga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
